root.speaker: npc
root.text: Chao co/chu, sap co man ngon khong?

options.label: Da man nha con vua hai sang nay, ngot lam a!
Man hoi chua, nhung re a.

ask_price_sour.speaker: npc
ask_price_sour.text: Chua vay chac con nit no thich, cho toi it thu nha.

options.label: Da con can cho co/chu lien!
Da bao bi het roi a.

leaf_buy_small.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_small.text: Cho toi 0.3 ky thoi, thu truoc da.

leaf_buy_medium.speaker: npc
leaf_buy_medium.text: 0.5 ky nha, can ky vo nghe!

leaf_decline_price.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_price.text: Troi, mac vay thoi toi qua sap khac.

leaf_decline_stock.speaker: npc
leaf_decline_stock.text: Vay thoi, lan sau ghe lai.
